---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the pain point or workflow gap.

**What does the solution look like?**
Describe the behavior you'd want. Be as specific as possible — command names, expected output, workflow changes.

**Which part of Shipyard does this affect?**
- [ ] A specific command (which one?)
- [ ] An agent (builder, reviewer, critic, researcher, test-runner, skill-writer)
- [ ] A hook or rule
- [ ] The data model or project structure
- [ ] Something new entirely

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, examples from other tools, or links to relevant discussions.
